data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T22:02 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.content: ✓ Heartbeat updated

? skogtown-wisp-wisp-14nhp [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-22 · Updated: 2026-02-22

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

CHILDREN
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-4j4mo: Check for orphaned processes ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-5l7kf: Scan agent health ● P2

  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-wewa9: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages ● P2

content.thinking: The mail system is crashing with a nil pointer dereference in the Dolt storage layer. This is a known infrastructure issue - the embedded Dolt database is having problems. Let me note this and continue with the patrol. I'll try the mail command once more, and if it fails again, log it and move on.

content.text: Mail system hitting a Dolt storage crash (nil pointer dereference). This is an infrastructure issue, not something I can fix in patrol. Noting and moving on.
